Package org.mitre.synthea.engine

Class ExpressedSymptom

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.engine.ExpressedSymptom
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class ExpressedSymptom extends Object implements Cloneable, Serializable
Represents an expressed symptom with associated sources and their details.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ExpressedSymptom.SymptomInfo
    Contains basic information regarding an expressed symptom, such as the cause, value, and the time it was set.
    class 
    ExpressedSymptom.SymptomSource
    Encapsulates module-based information regarding an expressed symptom.

  • Constructor Details

    • ExpressedSymptom

      public ExpressedSymptom(String name)
      Create a new ExpressedSymptom instance with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the symptom

  • Method Details

    • clone

      public ExpressedSymptom clone()
      Create a shallow copy of this instance.
      Overrides:
      clone in class Object
      Returns:
      a cloned instance of ExpressedSymptom

    • getSources

      public Map<String,ExpressedSymptom.SymptomSource> getSources()
      Get the sources of the symptom.
      Returns:
      a map of sources to SymptomSource

    • onSet

      public void onSet(String module, String cause, long time, int value, Boolean addressed)
      Update the data structure with a symptom being onset from a module.
      Parameters:
      module - the module setting the symptom
      cause - the cause of the symptom
      time - the time the symptom was set
      value - the value of the symptom
      addressed - whether the symptom is addressed

    • getSymptom

      public int getSymptom()
      Retrieve the value associated with a given symptom. This corresponds to the maximum value across all potential causes.
      Returns:
      the maximum value of the symptom

    • getSourceWithHighValue

      public String getSourceWithHighValue()
      Retrieve the source with the highest value not yet addressed.
      Returns:
      the source with the highest value

    • getValueFromSource

      public Integer getValueFromSource(String source)
      Retrieve the value associated with a given source.
      Parameters:
      source - the source of the symptom
      Returns:
      the value of the symptom from the source

    • addressSource

      public void addressSource(String source)
      Address a given source. Resolves the source if it exists in the symptom's sources.
      Parameters:
      source - the source to address

    • getSymptomLastUpdatedTime

      public Long getSymptomLastUpdatedTime(String module)
      Retrieve the last time the symptom was updated from a given module.
      Parameters:
      module - the module of the symptom
      Returns:
      the last update time of the symptom
